entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The pathogenic organism that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for disease incidence

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that reduces the effective life of hybrid cultivars

entities.name: FJ HYBRID CULTIVARS
entities.description: Commercial hybrid cultivars of pearl millet grown in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research and field surveys were conducted

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: The state in India with the largest area under pearl millet hybrids

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a hybrid cultivar to avoid infection by downy mildew

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The state of being prone to infection by downy mildew

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to cause disease in the host plant

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: The process of applying fungicides to seeds to reduce disease incidence

entities.name: METALAXYL
entities.description: A systemic fungicide used for seed treatment to control downy mildew

entities.name: OOSPORE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of resting spores by the pathogen Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: CROPPING SEQUENCES
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in a specific order in the same field

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A crop used in cropping sequences that significantly lowered downy mildew incidence

entities.name: CORIANDER
entities.description: A crop used in cropping sequences that significantly lowered downy mildew incidence

entities.name: ONION
entities.description: A crop used in cropping sequences that significantly lowered downy mildew incidence
